top_signals.title: Fifa’s red card scandal crosses ‘Rubicon’ on to the pitch
top_signals.summary: The football body was once riven by bribery and corruption claims. Now it faces accusations of interference in the game itself

top_signals.title: Infantino defends Fifa integrity after Trump intervention over banned player

top_signals.title: The Colorado River Crisis Is Reaching a Breaking Point
top_signals.summary: Depending on whom you talk to, the Colorado River serves either 35 million or 40 million people, all of whom are having to reconsider how much water they use and how they use it in the wake of an ongoing megadrought that arrived at the beginning of this century. The changes are no longer in the "let's-discuss-this" phase as the federal government threatens to impose up to a 40 percent cut in river water allocations over the next 10 years if the seven western states—Colorado, New Mexico, Wyoming, Utah, Arizona, Nevada, and California—and…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
